cases.failure_signature: User asked to review code changes but git-workflow skill was triggered for code review instead of dedicated review skill
cases.user_correction: User manually invoked review skill instead
cases.remedy: git-workflow should handle branching, merging, committing, and PR creation. Code review should route to dedicated review skill. Update descriptions to separate these concerns.

cases.failure_signature: User asked to summarize a long conversation into structured notes but no summarization skill was loaded or triggered

environment.context_note: 80+ turn conversation with multiple topics discussed

cases.user_correction: User manually summarized key points themselves
cases.remedy: A summarization/notes skill should trigger on keywords like 'summarize', 'key takeaways', 'action items', 'meeting notes'. Consider adding this skill.

cases.failure_signature: Deployment skill was auto-triggered by model when code appeared ready, but deployment should only happen with explicit user consent
cases.user_correction: Added disable-model-invocation: true to deploy skill frontmatter
cases.remedy: Any skill with side effects (deploy, send message, publish, commit) should have disable-model-invocation: true. Consider converting to a hook if it must run at a specific lifecycle point.

cases.failure_signature: docx skill failed in sandboxed environment because python-docx package was not installed and pip install was blocked
cases.user_correction: User ran skill in local environment where packages were pre-installed
cases.remedy: Skill should detect required package availability upfront and suggest alternative execution environments. Consider bundling pure-Python fallback.

cases.failure_signature: Both markdown and docx skills competed when user asked to 'write a report' — ambiguous whether inline text or file deliverable was expected
cases.user_correction: User clarified they wanted a .docx file, not inline markdown
cases.remedy: markdown skill should explicitly exclude tasks requesting formal document files. docx should claim 'report', 'document', 'deliverable' keywords more aggressively.

cases.failure_signature: Evolver skill generated overly complex prompt instructions after multiple evolution cycles, causing agent behavior to become unpredictable
cases.user_correction: User reset to original skill and applied a single targeted evolution step
cases.remedy: Cap evolution iterations (max 5-7). After each iteration, run a validation check: does the evolved skill still produce stable output? Stop if regression detected.

cases.failure_signature: User asked to search for local project files, but tavily web search skill was triggered instead of using local file search or grep
cases.user_correction: User clarified they wanted to search within the project codebase, not the web
cases.remedy: tavily should only trigger when user explicitly mentions web search, online research, or finding information on the internet. Local file/code search should route to grep or file search tools.

cases.failure_signature: Web search API returned rate limit exceeded error after multiple consecutive queries in a single session
cases.user_correction: User waited a few minutes and retried with fewer queries
cases.remedy: Implement query batching and caching within the skill. Warn user when approaching rate limits and suggest consolidating searches.

cases.failure_signature: tavily skill description mentioned 'web search' but did not indicate it also supports extracting page content, causing user to load separate scraping skill unnecessarily
cases.user_correction: User discovered tavily had content extraction after loading both skills
cases.remedy: tavily description should list all capabilities: search, extract, summarize pages. Avoid forcing users to load redundant scraping skills.

cases.failure_signature: xlsx skill threw error when trying to write a spreadsheet with cells containing mixed unicode characters and emoji
cases.user_correction: User simplified data to ASCII-only and retried
cases.remedy: xlsx skill should handle unicode normalization before writing cells. Test with diverse character sets including emoji, CJK, and RTL scripts.

cases.failure_signature: TDD skill was optionally triggered but user wanted tests to run automatically before every commit, not just when explicitly asked
cases.user_correction: User set up a pre-commit hook to run tests instead of relying on skill
cases.remedy: Test execution that must happen deterministically (before commits, on file save) should be implemented as a hook, not an optional skill.

cases.failure_signature: TDD skill generated tests but they lacked edge case coverage and assertions were incomplete — tests passed but did not verify behavior
cases.user_correction: User manually added additional test cases and assertions
cases.remedy: TDD skill should enforce a checklist: test happy path, edge cases, error conditions, and boundary values. Include assertion templates for common patterns.

cases.failure_signature: User asked to fill out a PDF form but skill was not triggered because request used 'fill in' instead of 'populate' or 'create'
cases.user_correction: User manually invoked /pdf skill
cases.remedy: pdf skill description should include 'fill in form', 'complete PDF', 'add data to PDF' as trigger phrases alongside existing 'populate' keywords.

cases.failure_signature: security-audit skill was model-optional and skipped during urgent deployments, but security checks should be mandatory before any release
cases.user_correction: User added security scan as mandatory CI step instead of skill
cases.remedy: Security auditing must never be model-optional. Convert to a pre-deployment hook or CI gate. Skills with security implications should use disable-model-invocation: true at minimum.

cases.failure_signature: Browser CDP connection failed when trying to attach to Chrome instance — browser not launched with remote-debugging-port flag
cases.user_correction: User launched Chrome manually with --remote-debugging-port=9222 before invoking skill
cases.remedy: browser-cdp should check if a debuggable browser instance exists before connecting. If not found, offer to launch one automatically with correct flags.

cases.failure_signature: CDP skill failed to connect because Chrome sandbox environment lacked required dependencies (libx11, libxcomposite) for headless mode
cases.user_correction: Installed missing system packages via apt before running skill
cases.remedy: Skill should detect missing browser dependencies and provide installation instructions, or gracefully degrade to a simpler scraping method.

cases.failure_signature: CDP skill instructions lost during multi-page scraping session — agent forgot pagination handling rules and started re-scraping same pages
cases.user_correction: User broke task into smaller batches of 10 pages each
cases.remedy: Web scraping tasks should be chunked into sub-sessions. Skill should maintain a state file (JSON) tracking progress rather than relying on conversation context.

cases.failure_signature: Both gog-workspace and generic file-management skills triggered for a task involving organizing project files within a workspace directory
cases.user_correction: User manually selected gog-workspace to handle the task
cases.remedy: gog-workspace description should explicitly claim file organization within workspace directories and set higher priority than generic file skills.

cases.failure_signature: User asked for a simple inline data table but data-visualization skill was triggered, generating a full chart when tabular output sufficed
cases.user_correction: User clarified they wanted a markdown table, not a visualization
cases.remedy: data-visualization should only trigger when user explicitly asks for charts, graphs, plots, or visual analysis. Simple data display should use markdown tables.

cases.failure_signature: Frontend skill instructions degraded in long coding session — agent forgot to apply responsive design and accessibility requirements mid-project

environment.context_note: 40+ turn conversation, multiple components being built

cases.user_correction: User re-invoked the skill to refresh requirements
cases.remedy: Frontend skill should be invoked in focused sub-sessions per component rather than one long session. Keep SKILL.md concise with a checklist of non-negotiable requirements.

cases.failure_signature: api-design skill generated REST endpoints but omitted error response schemas, pagination conventions, and versioning strategy
cases.user_correction: User manually added missing API design standards
cases.remedy: api-design skill should include a mandatory output template: endpoints, request/response schemas, error format, pagination, auth, versioning. Checklist-driven generation.
